body_txt: Heroes perform amazing feats, save the day and everything's golden. But Where Do They Get All Those Wonderful Abilities ? The answer is an alien (or demon or robot) latched on and the hero gets some nifty superpowers as a result. Sometimes this tenant will be a Super-Powered Alter Ego and may not share the hero's agenda . Different types seen include: Parasite Zombies , Vampirism , Adaptive Armor , Artificial Limbs , Clingy Costumes , bystanders, and villains. This is when a Viral Transformation works smarter and You're Nothing Without Your Phlebotinum can actually be true; for the more holistic transformation see Fusion Dance . Compare with The Symbiote , Powers via Possession , Willing Channeler , Pro-Human Transhuman , and Bad Powers, Good People ; contrast Superhuman Transfusion , Symbiotic Possession , Transhuman Treachery , and Bad Powers, Bad People .
